description: Crafted from genuine leather, this wallet from wac by wrangler is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Wac has elegantly combined classic techniques and innovative designs so you can carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 10 cm x 12 cmHas two main compartmentsSix card slotsTwo slip pockets on either sideBrand logo appliqued on the frontStitched detailing on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
